character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: A physician involved in a group of sailors, offering counsel and moral guidance to Jim and Silver.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A former leader of a group of sailors, now conflicted and vulnerable, negotiating with the doctor and Jim.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: A young sailor participating in the group's affairs, confessing to the doctor about his actions.

character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: A captain whose illness influences the group's dynamics, referenced in dialogue.

character_dossiers.name: Ben Gunn
character_dossiers.biography: A survivor discovered by Jim, associated with the island's secrets.
